name: Figure of Destiny
oracleText: {R/W}: This creature becomes a Kithkin Spirit with base power and toughness 2/2. {R/W}{R/W}{R/W}: If this creature is a Spirit, it becomes a Kithkin Spirit Warrior with base power and toughness 4/4. {R/W}{R/W}{R/W}{R/W}{R/W}{R/W}: If this creature is a Warrior, it becomes a Kithkin Spirit Warrior Avatar with base power and toughness 8/8, flying, and first strike.

name: Overbeing of Myth
actualAnalyzerRoles: card_draw, combat_body, combat_support, direct_draw, draw, repeatable_advantage, repeatable_draw
oracleText: Overbeing of Myth's power and toughness are each equal to the number of cards in your hand. At the beginning of your draw step, draw an additional card.
